_comment: dialogue_cinderglen.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Cinderglen.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome to Cinderglen, where the tea is hot and the gossip hotter!
dialogue.help: We could use a hand with the spring festival setup—or chasing off those pesky bog rats.
dialogue.lore: Cinderglen was built around the Ember Springs, said to soothe even the weariest soul.
dialogue.farewell: Come back soon, and bring stories!

dialogue.greeting: Rooms are cozy, pies are fresh, and the cider’s on tap!
dialogue.help: If you’re looking for work, check the notice board by the hearth.
dialogue.lore: They say a bard once wrote a song here that made the stars weep.
dialogue.farewell: Sleep tight, and don’t let the fire sprites bite!

dialogue.greeting: Ah, a fellow lover of song and story! What brings you to my stage?
dialogue.help: We’re composing a ballad of the Lightfall—care to lend your voice?
dialogue.lore: The Echoes of the Deep believe every melody carries a memory of the world.
